column1: # Regression guard for the function-word / connective surface — prepositions,
# conjunctions, particles and connective adverbs that the lexicon (incl. the
# RNC short-word calibration) should keep resolving. These are NOT a proof of
# the calibration win (most resolve regardless); they pin the area so future
# lexicon or ranking changes can't silently break common connectives.
# Run: cargo run -p abbrev-cli -- bench data/bench/function.tsv
